Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ServiceContract

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ServiceContract
public class ServiceContract extends SObject

Java class for ServiceContract complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ServiceContract">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivationDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdditionalDiscount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApprovalStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Attachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingAddress" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}address" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingCity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingCountry" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingGeocodeAccuracy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingLatitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingLongitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingPostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingStreet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Cases" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChildServiceContracts" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Contact" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contact" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContractLineItems" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContractNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DescendantServiceContracts" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Discount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Emails" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Entitlements" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Events" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GrandTotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LineItemCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LookedUpFromActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Notes" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NotesAndAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OpenActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentServiceContract" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ServiceContract" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentServiceContractId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Pricebook2" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Pricebook2" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Pricebook2Id" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RootServiceContract" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ServiceContract" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RootServiceContractId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingAddress" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}address" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingCity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingCountry" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingGeocodeAccuracy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingHandling" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingLatitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingLongitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingPostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShippingStreet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SpecialTerms" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subtotal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Tasks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Tax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Term" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPrice" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkOrders" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
